title: nahkd's Stonks
description: Server-side global market for your server.
body:
![Stonks Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nahkd123/stonks/main/1.21.x/docs/banner.png)
# Stonks
_Server-side global market for your server!_

## What is Stonks?
Stonks is a server-side mod that adds global market, where players can create buy/sell offers, while others can instant buy or sell for quick bucks (tl;dr: it's just like hypixel skyblock bazaar).

Please see **Important note** at the bottom of this page when setting up Stonks.

![Screenshot of market main menu](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/sUBS64LI/images/6b96b3c644cb42692857e681a3fc7cfce6279b1c.png)

## What makes Stonks special?
- Fully server-side! Your player doesn't need to install this; they can use `/market` to open the menu.
- Trade with anyone on the server: Place offers and wait or instantly buy something from other player if you can't wait.
- ok I really can't tell what makes Stonks special other than being a "hypixel skyblock bazaar at home" edition.

## Important note
- Versions below 2.0.5 **contains a critical bug that can cause market data losses**. Please see the 2.0.5 changelog for more information. 
- Stonks does not works properly without further setup. See [Configuration guide](https://nahkd123.github.io/stonks/User%27s%20Documentations/Configuration/) for more information. I mean you don't have to, but it only works partially (missing economy system for example).
- Stonks **does not** comes with economy system by default, but does have supports for vanilla scoreboards (`/scoreboard` thing) and Patbox's Common Economy API.

    If you don't have compatible economy system, you can use scoreboard as economy system by adding `useAdapter stonks.fabric.adapter.provided.ScoreboardEconomyAdapter` to Stonks configuration, located inside `config/stonks/` folder.

    If you do have one, you still have to add adapter, like `useAdapter stonks.fabric.adapter.provided.CommonEconomyAdapter` for example. Some adapters (`CommonEconomyAdapter` included) requires extra configurations. See [this documentations](https://nahkd123.github.io/stonks/References/Adapters/CommonEconomyAdapter/) for more information.
- Configurations can only be reloaded by restarting server. Fortunately, you can load Stonks in singleplayer worlds and can reload configurations by rejoining your world.
